Header.headerText: Clean code. Sharp decisions. Steady hand.
Header.title: Arbuz

Hero.shortText: Building web applications focused on architecture, clear data flow, and scalable interfaces.

AboutMe.description1: I design interfaces with <highlight>React</highlight> and <highlight>Next.js</highlight> (<highlight>App Router</highlight>), using <highlight>Feature-Sliced Design</highlight> as a mental model for <secondary>building scalable systems</secondary>. <secondary>To me, high-quality code</secondary> means <secondary>solutions that remain clear</secondary> for the team and <secondary>reliable for the business</secondary> even years later.
AboutMe.description2: In practice, I work as a <highlight>frontend-oriented full-stack engineer</highlight>. <secondary>My background in backend development</secondary> (NestJS, Laravel) and <secondary>DevOps processes</secondary> (Docker, GitLab CI/CD) helps me see the product beyond the frontend. It makes <secondary>working with APIs</secondary> and <secondary>integrations</secondary> easier and allows me to <secondary>make more informed architectural decisions</secondary>.
AboutMe.description3: <secondary>For me, development</secondary> is not just about completing tasks, but about <secondary>taking responsibility</secondary> for the product and its <secondary>long-term sustainability</secondary>. <secondary>I feel most comfortable in strong engineering teams</secondary> where I can <secondary>contribute architecturally</secondary> and continue growing technically.

Experience.leftSubtitle: Experience is tough problems I’ve already solved.

ongoing.description: Developing an e-commerce platform on <secondary>Next.js (App Router)</secondary> with a <secondary>server-first</secondary> data model. I apply <secondary>Feature-Sliced Design</secondary> to structure business logic and ensure feature isolation. Designed administrative interfaces for catalog and order management. Implementing an age verification module (18+) based on an AI model. <secondary>Ownership:</secondary> Managing the project independently - from architectural decisions to implementation and infrastructure setup.
ongoing.resultDescription: Successfully launched the MVP with a scalable architecture

contract.description: Led the full design and integration cycle of <secondary>Payload CMS v3</secondary> into the <secondary>Next.js</secondary> architecture. Designed the CMS structure from scratch: data schemas, collections, access roles, and publishing workflows. Built a centralized <secondary>server-first</secondary> data layer with unified resolvers and <secondary>granular ISR cache invalidation</secondary>.
contract.resultDescription: Created a manageable headless system with a predictable content update model. Content is fully decoupled from the application, reducing manual operations and improving page load stability.

cpabox.description: Developed and evolved the frontend architecture of a SaaS platform for traffic analytics and automation, integrating <secondary>Facebook Marketing API, Keitaro, Dolphin</secondary>, and <secondary>Flex Card</secondary>. Ensured <secondary>API contract consistency</secondary> and predictable UI behavior across modules. Architected the state management system using <secondary>Zustand</secondary>, streamlining data flow between analytics and operational modules.Developed core interfaces including <secondary>the analytics dashboard</secondary> (ApexCharts), campaign management tools, and automation features. Built a <secondary>Telegram Web App</secondary> and a <secondary>NestJS backend</secondary> for domain monitoring, webhook processing, and real-time data synchronization.
cpabox.resultDescription: Improved UI stability, streamlined monitoring, and management automation and third-party integrations.

remotza.description: Designed backend architecture in <secondary>Laravel</secondary> for client projects with <secondary>Vue.js</secondary> integration. Implemented both standalone SPA modules and hybrid Vue components rendered within Blade templates. Optimized <secondary>PostgreSQL</secondary> queries and introduced <secondary>Redis</secondary> caching.
remotza.resultDescription: Improved API performance and reduced database load through query optimization and caching.

aopsrm.description: Developed a multilingual platform with a <secondary>React</secondary> frontend and a custom <secondary>Laravel CMS</secondary> with an administrative panel for content management and publishing. Configured <secondary>Docker</secondary> and <secondary>GitLab CI/CD</secondary> pipelines for stable deployments and isolated environments. <secondary>Ownership:</secondary> Owned the full project lifecycle — from initial development to production deployment and maintenance.
aopsrm.resultDescription: Delivered a CMS that enabled the team to manage and publish content independently.

Education.leftSubtitle: Experience in finance doesn’t compete with code - it makes decisions more precise.
Education.pathTitle: My background in finance helps me better design business logic, metrics, and reporting in complex web systems.

Additional.leftSubtitle: Projects are measured not in lines of code, but in value.
Additional.intro: Open-source project demonstrating my architectural approach to analytics and product systems.

projectFeatures.item2: <highlight>Flexible data management:</highlight> JSON-based demo mode or full version with <highlight>PostgreSQL, Prisma,</highlight> and event analytics.
projectFeatures.item4: <highlight>Performance</highlight> Lighthouse ≥ 95 across all Core Web Vitals.

Footer.finalWords: If you need results — let’s talk.

Common.finalWords: If you need results — let’s talk.
